response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform design, with most roles centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and web technologies; while they have diverse full-stack experience and leadership in open-source projects, their technical foundation does not align with the core requirements of a cloud compute platform lead role.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and domains
Proven leadership in open-source projects and technical mentoring via workshops
Demonstrated ability to build and deploy scalable systems using Kubernetes and CI/CD
concerns: Only minimal C++ exposure (LabWindows/CVI role), far below 8-year requirement
No evidence of cloud compute platform architecture or distributed systems leadership
Primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript, not aligned with C++-centric infrastructure needs
